title: ai&me
description: ai&me is a lifecycle-driven AI assurance platform that enables low-code, contextual adversarial testing, behavioral QA, real-time firewalling, and post-deployment evaluation. It integrates into development workflows to test, secure, and monitor generative AI applications across pre-production and production environments.

items: Agent Penetration Testing, Adversarial red-teaming: goal drift, prompt injection, hallucination chaining, & over-permissioned tool usage.
Validate agent decisions against expected goal plans.
